error_signature: multi-intent error in supabase vector store
title: Handling multi-part questions in Supabase vector store
symptom: When asking a multipart question, the Supabase vector store throws an error due to ambiguity in the input.
not_this_if: No error occurs in the vector store
root_cause: The Supabase vector store cannot process multipart questions as they can be ambiguous or malformed. This leads to errors when the input is not clearly defined as separate queries.
fix_steps: Add a Function node immediately after your trigger to split the user's question into parts.
Use the provided code to split the input and return each part as a separate item.
Connect the Function node to a SplitInBatches node with Batch Size set to 1.
Connect the output of the SplitInBatches node to the AI Agent.
After the AI Agent, add a Merge node to collect all responses.
agent_instruction: Implement a Function node to split multipart questions before sending them to the AI Agent.
